use_cases: Animated hero section backgrounds for landing pages
Dynamic page backgrounds for SaaS and marketing sites
Visual atmosphere for media and entertainment platforms
Engaging backgrounds for e-commerce product showcases
Ambient visual effects for presentation dashboards
ai_summary: A WebGL-powered animated wave background component that renders flowing, organic wave patterns using custom GLSL shaders. Features dual theme support with distinct color palettes for light and dark modes, responsive resolution scaling, and smooth time-based animations. Utilizes the OGL library for high-performance canvas rendering with device pixel ratio optimization, making it suitable for hero sections and full-page background effects.
